overallRule: Do not calculate or publish a readiness percentage. Overall readiness is verified only when every required dimension is verified and no blocker remains.

statusDefinitions.not_started: No production-quality implementation or verified evidence exists yet.
statusDefinitions.foundation_ready: Production-grade boundaries or contracts exist, but the capability is not operationally verified.
statusDefinitions.in_progress: Evidence-backed implementation is underway and remaining work is explicit.
statusDefinitions.blocked: A required approval, owner-confirmed fact, credential, permission, or prerequisite is missing.
statusDefinitions.ready_for_review: Implementation and evidence are complete enough for the required review gate.
statusDefinitions.verified: The capability passed its required production, authorization, and operating checks.

production_foundation.label: Production foundation
evidence: PR #135 merged the reviewed Momo production foundation and Restaurant Audit Center V1.
Six production migrations are applied and ledger/hash verified.
Sites version 4 and both custom domains are verified active with active SSL.
production_foundation.nextAction: Preserve the verified boundary and rerun only affected RR groups when protected files change.

team_identity_and_access.label: Team identity and authenticated access
evidence: Magic-link-only Supabase Auth, active profile/membership checks, route guards, and RLS are deployed.
Public account creation and password sign-in/recovery are disabled.
blockers: The approved Team identity still requires supported Admin provisioning.
Authenticated Team/Momo browser smoke testing is incomplete.
team_identity_and_access.nextAction: Provision the approved Team identity through the supported Admin path and complete authenticated browser authorization tests.

business_truth_and_onboarding.label: Business truth and onboarding
evidence: The locked onboarding flow is Audit to Prefill to Owner verification to Veroxa gap completion to Final approval.
Internal Momo business-truth and Restaurant Intelligence foundations exist.
blockers: Production owner-confirmed identity, hours, menu, services, contacts, dietary/halal claims, brand voice, goals, and presence-stack records are not complete.
Uncertain facts cannot be used publicly before owner confirmation.
business_truth_and_onboarding.nextAction: Build Momo Restaurant Intelligence + Onboarding V1 with persistent field-level truth statuses and Team/client confirmation views.

media_and_rights.label: Media, rights, and intelligence
evidence: Private Momo storage policies and an internal media/content inventory model exist.
AI media metadata, quality, reuse, duplicate, context, and compliance requirements are documented.
blockers: No production Momo media inventory with verified usage rights exists.
Upload, review, classification, and reuse have not been verified end to end.
media_and_rights.nextAction: Connect Momo media intake to persistent rights, review, AI classification, quality, tagging, duplicate, and reuse states.

ai_and_automation.label: AI and safe automation
evidence: Brand voice, controlled drafting, approval queue, and human-review rules exist.
Publishing and reputation-sensitive work remain approval gated.
blockers: Runtime AI provider calls are inactive.
Verified business truth and permissioned media inputs are incomplete.
Production retry, audit, monitoring, and cost controls are not verified.
ai_and_automation.nextAction: Build provider-neutral AI preparation, approval, retry, audit, monitoring, and manual-fallback workflows before connecting a live provider.

meta_social.label: Meta social handling
evidence: Facebook and Instagram handling is part of the locked Momo readiness scope.
blockers: Owner-controlled Meta access and publishing permission are not connected or verified.
No production social publishing workflow has passed approval, retry, and activity-history tests.
meta_social.nextAction: Prepare the no-new-spend Meta adapter boundary, content/calendar states, approvals, retries, and audit trail; connect only after explicit access approval.

google_seo_and_reviews.label: Google, local SEO, and reviews
evidence: Google Business Profile, local SEO, review handling, and visibility monitoring are part of the locked Momo readiness scope.
blockers: Owner-controlled Google access is not connected or verified.
Reputation-sensitive response and publishing permissions are not active.
No verified baseline or production monitoring history exists.
google_seo_and_reviews.nextAction: Build provider-neutral Google/SEO/review tasks, approvals, evidence, monitoring, and manual fallbacks; connect only after explicit access approval.

website_menu_and_ordering.label: Website, menu, and ordering paths
evidence: Website, menu, contact, and ordering-path review is included in the locked Momo operating scope.
blockers: Current owner-confirmed menu, hours, links, services, and website access are incomplete.
No external website or ordering-platform write is authorized.
website_menu_and_ordering.nextAction: Persist the verified presence stack and create evidence-backed website/menu/order readiness checks with prepared, approval-gated actions.

operations_reporting_and_monitoring.label: Operations, reporting, and monitoring
evidence: Momo work, reporting, activity, and readiness surfaces exist with honest safe-empty states.
Reports are required to use reviewed activity rather than invented outcomes.
blockers: Production Momo work history, platform activity, weekly updates, monthly reporting, alerts, retries, and recovery are not verified end to end.
operations_reporting_and_monitoring.nextAction: Connect persistent Momo work, reviewed activity, reporting, observability, retry, alert, and recovery records.

activation_and_recovery.label: Activation, recovery, and owner walkthrough
evidence: Activation remains a separate decision and cannot be inferred from foundation readiness.
blockers: All other required readiness dimensions are not verified.
Momo owner contact, walkthrough, credentials, permissions, and publishing require separate explicit approval.
activation_and_recovery.nextAction: Run the final Momo go/no-go gate only after every required readiness dimension is verified and all remaining approvals are explicit.

costPolicy.rule: Complete production-quality no-new-spend components first. Keep paid or usage-based connections modular and inactive until explicit approval.
